operations.notes:
Find virtual servers matching a given IP address.
You can search for the virtual server itself of any of its members.

parameters.name: domainId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of a domain

responseMessages.message: There is no domain with the specified ID.

f5_virtual_server.description: The list of virtual servers and their details

name.description: The name of the virtual server in SecureTrack

port.description: The port that the virtual server is forwarding (Any is shown as "-1")

protocol.description: The protocol that the virtual server is forwarding

uid.description: The UID of the virtual server

netmask.description: The netmask for the virtual server VIP address

virtual_ip.description: The virtual IP address of the device

pool_member.description: The server group members that are associated with the virtual server

f5_device.description: The f5 device ID and name

@href.description: The location of the referenced object

name.description: The name of the server group member

ip.description: The IP address of the server group member

netmask.description: The netmask for the IP address of the server group member

name.description: The name of the referenced object

type.description: The type of the referenced object

display_name.description: The display name of the referenced object

management_domain.description: The management domain from which the referenced object comes from

uid.description: The unique identifier of the referenced object

link.description: The data structure that contains the href tag, which sets the location of the referenced object in the SecureApp database

member.description: List of references to a DM_INLINE group members
